creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 204026
svn diff to upgrade to 0.55.4

gohugo has been updated to 0.55.4
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.55.4)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.55.2 to 0.55.4

Change log:
 - Avoid recloning of shortcode templates
 - No links for bundled pages
 - Avoid rebuilding the Translations map for every lookup
 - Init mem profile at the end
 - Fix shortcode version=1 logic

Build successfully against amd64/i386 11.2-RELEASE, 11.2-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.0-STABLE, and 13.0-CURRENT.

Poudriere logs available here for a limited time:
https://logs.bnix.club/gohugo-0.55.4_2019-04-25/

portlint -AC:
looks fine.
